## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes (0 errors)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] If adding a new event type: `events.ts`, `eventReducer.ts`, and the test file updated
- [ ] If changing `AvatarConfig`: `config.ts`, `defaultConfig`, and dashboard `ControlPanel.tsx` updated
- [ ] If changing `AvatarMesh` interface: both `ProceduralAvatarMesh` and `GltfAvatarMesh` updated
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or public API changed
